plugins.name: metabase-dashboard
plugins.description: Build fully functional Metabase dashboards end-to-end — schema exploration, design, card creation, layout arrangement, and filter wiring. Requires the metabase-mcp-server MCP server (github.com/CognitionAI/metabase-mcp-server).
